items.title: Apple seeks U.S. approval to buy chips from blacklisted CXMT: FT
items.summary: ChangXin Memory Technologies is on the Pentagon’s 1260H list of companies with alleged connections to the Chinese military.
items.titleZh: 苹果寻求美国批准从列入黑名单的CXMT:FT购买芯片
items.summaryZh: 长新存储技术公司被列入五角大楼1260H份涉嫌与中国军方有联系的公司名单。

items.title: SpaceX, Charter discussed mobile phone partnership in U.S.
items.summary: Charter, the largest home internet provider in the US, could run some of SpaceX’s phone traffic through its ground-based internet infrastructure.
items.titleZh: SpaceX和Charter讨论了在美国的手机合作关系。
items.summaryZh: Charter是美国最大的家庭互联网提供商，可以通过其地面互联网基础设施运行SpaceX的部分电话流量。

items.title: ‘It’s not going away’: The Stanford economist who called the AI entry-level jobs crisis early has the receipts
items.summary: Stanford's Erik Brynjolfsson is partnering with ADP's Nela Richardson on a live dashboard tracking what they found last summer: AI is eating entry-level work.
items.titleZh: “它不会消失”：早期称AI入门级就业危机的斯坦福大学经济学家有收据
items.summaryZh: 斯坦福大学的Erik Brynjolfsson与ADP的Nela Richardson合作，在一个实时仪表板上跟踪他们去年夏天的发现：人工智能正在吞噬入门级工作。

items.title: Trustpilot just partnered with Shopify to put its reviews where AI search engines are already looking
items.summary: Trustpilot has struck a partnership with Shopify that will let the platform’s merchants display and manage Trustpilot reviews directly inside their online stores. The integration goes live on June 29 and is the Danish review company’s first native tie-up with…
items.titleZh: Trustpilot刚刚与Shopify合作，将其评论放在人工智能搜索引擎已经在寻找的地方
items.summaryZh: Trustpilot已与Shopify达成合作伙伴关系，允许该平台的商家直接在其在线商店内显示和管理Trustpilot评论。此次整合将于6月29日上线，是这家丹麦评论公司与…的首次本土合作…

items.title: SpaceX stock has cooled. Hiring for jobs in the space economy hasn't
items.summary: The SpaceX IPO euphoria is over, but the bullish trend in space economy jobs remains in place within a labor market where many other sectors have slowed hiring.
items.titleZh: SpaceX的股票已经冷却。在太空经济中招聘工作并没有
items.summaryZh: SpaceX的IPO热潮已经结束，但在许多其他行业放缓招聘的劳动力市场中，太空经济工作的看涨趋势仍然存在。

items.title: How America's first fine dining restaurant, Delmonico's, serves 400 pounds of steak a day
items.summary: Founded in 1837, Delmonico's is a living piece of American culinary history.
items.titleZh: 美国第一家高级餐厅Delmonico's每天供应400磅牛排
items.summaryZh: Delmonico’s成立于1837年，是美国烹饪史上一部活生生的作品。

items.title: Mercedes posts Tesla-like efficiency hauling 36 tons through a German winter
items.summary: Despite the rapidly growing number of heavy-duty EVs on western roads, a number of myths still persist about range, charging infrastructure, and economic viability. To combat those myths, Mercedes-Benz is sharing real-world data from 80 of its deployed electr…
items.titleZh: 梅赛德斯发布了类似特斯拉的效率，在德国冬季运输了36吨
items.summaryZh: 尽管西部公路上重型电动汽车的数量迅速增长，但关于续航里程、充电基础设施和经济可行性的一些神话仍然存在。为了消除这些误解，梅赛德斯-奔驰正在分享其部署的80辆电动汽车的真实数据…

items.title: How GE Vernova builds the massive gas turbines powering the AI data center boom
items.summary: GE Vernova turbines are powering Elon Musk's xAI Colossus 1 data center and Microsoft just bought seven to power its data center in Texas.
items.titleZh: GE Vernova如何建造为人工智能数据中心热潮提供动力的大型燃气轮机
items.summaryZh: 通用电气Vernova涡轮机为埃隆·马斯克的xAI Colossus 1数据中心供电，微软刚刚购买了7台涡轮机为其位于德克萨斯州的数据中心供电。

items.title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like models as Anthropic's export ban drags on
items.summary: New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like capabilities without fear of an export ban. U.S. AI labs may never recover this enormous market.
items.titleZh: 随着Anthropic的出口禁令持续，亚洲人工智能初创公司推出了类似神话的模型
items.summaryZh: 新车型正在亚洲推出，有望在不担心出口禁令的情况下提供神话般的功能。美国人工智能实验室可能永远无法恢复这个巨大的市场。

items.title: It’s a tale of two S&P 500s as rotation out of top tech stocks shifts into overdrive
items.summary: The equal-weighted version of the S 500 outperformed its traditional capitalization-weighted sibling this week by the widest margin in six years.
items.titleZh: 这是一个关于两个标准普尔500指数的故事，因为顶级科技股的轮换进入超速状态
items.summaryZh: 本周，等权重版本的标准普尔500指数以六年来最大的幅度超过了其传统的资本加权兄弟指数。

items.title: 13 Google Photos settings I always change on every new device
items.summary: Before I let Google Photos loose on my Android or iPhone camera roll, I check these backup, privacy, and AI settings first.
items.titleZh: 13谷歌照片设置我总是在每台新设备上更改
items.summaryZh: 在我把谷歌照片放在我的安卓或iPhone相机胶卷上之前，我先检查了这些备份、隐私和人工智能设置。

items.title: Google was the dream job in tech. These workers decided to leave anyway.
items.summary: Six former Google employees explain why they left one of tech's most coveted employers.
items.titleZh: 谷歌是科技行业的理想工作。但这些员工还是决定离开。
items.summaryZh: 六名前谷歌员工解释了他们为什么离开科技公司最令人垂涎的雇主之一。
